titleStmt.title: SII 9.560: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 560. (A.R. No. 789 of 1917.) ON THREE PIECES OF A BROKEN SLAB LYING NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT CHAGALERU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Mārgaśira, ba. 15, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1533 December 15 Monday. It records that Kampadēvarasa-Aṇṇa of Chāgalēra-Kāntēri made a gift of a wet field, a khaṇḍuga in sowing capacity, for the service of the god Avubhaḷadēva at Chāgalēru. The gift was made for the merit of the king Achyutarāya-Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhujayaśāli
vāhanaśakavaruśaṁgaḷu sāvirada
sā 1455 neya vijayasaṁvatsarada
mārgasira ba 15 sōmavāra kāla pu(ṁ)
ṇyakāladalli cēgalēra Avubaḷadēva
rige A cāgalēra penugoṁḍe vēṁṭe
yake saluva cālakūra staḷada voḷagaṇa
cēgalēra grāmadalli śrīmanmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa śrīacutarāyamahā
rāyarige dharmmavāgabēkeṁdu cāgalē
ra kāṁtēriya kaṁppadēvarasaAṁṇagaḷu
śrī Acutarāyarige dharmmavāgabē
keṁdu Ā cāgalēra grāmadalli Avubhaḷadē
varige Ā cāgalēra kaṁpayyaṁgaḷa dēva
ra nitya naivēdyake kha 1 Akṣaradallu
khaṁḍaga gaddeyanu Acutarāyama
hārāyarige dharmmavāgabēkeṁdu A
Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi koṭa
dharmmaśāsana davarige taṁma
vāgi naḍasadaṁta Avarige
taṁma taṁde tāyanu vāraṇā
siyalli koṁda drōhake hōha[ru .]
Digital edition of SII 9.560 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
